description: The Union Times (總匯新報) was a Chinese language newspaper published in Singapore from 1908 to 1946. It also had the name Nanyang zonghui xinbao (南洋總匯新報). In the years leading up to the 1911 revolution in China the newspaper supported the imperial position. In 1946 it merged with the 星洲日報.
title: The Union Times (總匯新報)
